label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation)
rationale: Top-of-form: the corporation's Maine-registered name (domestic-entity convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: All restated statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (*MBCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Narrow inline blank (≈45 wide) for the exhibit letter that holds the full restated articles text. Parallel to MBCA-9's amendment.text_exhibit_letter — but scoped to restatement.* because the exhibit holds the entire restated document, not a single amendment.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The restated articles of incorporation consolidate all amendments into a single document
SECOND: If a new amendment is included in the restated articles of incorporation the following must be completed
rationale: Mutually-exclusive option = 'includes_new_amendment'. When selected, the conditional sub-fields (adoption date, approval method, optional share-exchange exhibit) become required.

label_verbatim: The text of the new amendment was adopted on (date) ___
rationale: Date the new amendment was adopted (conditional on restatement.type = 'includes_new_amendment'). Reuses MBCA-9's amendment.adoption_date.

label_verbatim: by the incorporators – shareholder approval was not required
rationale: Approval-method enum value = 'incorporators'. Reuses MBCA-9's amendment.approval_method.

label_verbatim: by the board of directors – shareholder approval was not required
by the shareholders in the manner required by this Act and by the articles of incorporation
THIRD: ...are set forth in Exhibit ___ or as follows
rationale: Narrow inline blank (≈27 wide) at y=267 — the THIRD-section exhibit letter for share-exchange/reclassification/cancellation implementing provisions. Reuses MBCA-9's amendment.share_exchange_exhibit_letter (same form text).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The effective date of the restated articles of incorporation (if other than the date of filing of the restated articles of incorporation) is ___
rationale: Wider inline blank at y=225 (FOURTH section). Optional future-effective-date for the restated articles. Parallel to merger.future_effective_date / conversion.future_effective_date / domestication.future_effective_date (form-scoped naming convention).

label_verbatim: Dated
rationale: Signature-row date on left at y=195.

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Shape D — combined name+capacity at y=161, right side. Capacity is constrained by footnote ** to 'duly authorized officer OR the clerk' (13-C §121.5). The signature line itself has no AcroForm widget (wet-ink only).
